name: anna-bliver-fan-hub
description: Open-source Bilibili live community hub with songs, marshmallows, points, rewards and optional bot integration
author: Linus_Lieu

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm run test:ci --prefix frontend
scripts.audit: npm audit --prefix backend --omit=dev && npm audit --prefix frontend --omit=dev
